subcodes.title: Words spoken at The White Lodge in Wimbledon, 1913-01-03
subcodes.first_line: How beautiful it is to organize such lovely gatherings... When we ponder over the reality of the microcosm, we discover that in the microcosm there are deposited three realities.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر جزئی از اجزاء فردیه در صور نامتناهی جمادی نباتی حیوانی انسانی سیر دارد
subcodes.subjects: @power of the mind over nature, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @oneness; unity of religion, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal
